entries.heading: Info Notice (Showcase)
entries.short_description: This is a non-critical informational notice.
entries.long_description:
Info notices are for general information only.

They automatically dismiss after 10 seconds if you do not interact with them. You can still click buttons before the timer runs out.

entries.heading: Warning Notice (Showcase)
entries.short_description: This is a warning that requires your attention before continuing.
entries.long_description:
Warning notices are styled in yellow.

They do not auto-dismiss. You must click a button or the Ignore option (with confirmation) to proceed with loading.

entries.heading: Modular Consoles – Migration Required
entries.short_description: The original Modular Consoles mod is broken. Migrate to the maintained community version.
entries.long_description:
The original author is unavailable and the mod is broken on current game versions (especially the beta branch).

This will add the Manifest repo and install the replacement 'modularconsoles' version.

LibConstruct is also required for full functionality.

entries.heading: LibConstruct – Migration Required
entries.short_description: LibConstruct (companion to Modular Consoles) is broken. Migrate to the maintained version.
entries.long_description:
Companion library that is also broken on current game versions.

This will install the repo version from the same Manifest repo.
